textByHashes.327f9c959e848762aed7e71922444b869bc6cbd0: Greetings adventurer and welcome to the museum!
textByHashes.2469371f0d54a6b2eea0ba907c1c707549f532ef: The museum has been constructed thanks to the efforts of adventurers across Gielinor, feel free to explore this floor or one below at your leisure.
textByHashes.5f3fea26af57d5a90f736bf499e56f4d3aad5035: This museum was built as a monument to Gielinor and contains exhibits which showcase the wonders of the world brought to light by adventurers such as yourself.
textByHashes.58be408e6a649ee3008c2bdb270f1b9a66e9b345: This floor was built some time ago but due to popular demand and some recent contributions the floor below has also been opened up for display.
textByHashes.508b8ae2b71a09cb551cf0e5c216f5f4f0ea6c59: While we no longer require any contributions we'll happily take any unwanted excess that you may have.
textByHashes.00ba0aaa47cccf2b8f7e94f5cf2951c824db2884: Hmm, it appears you don't have anything on you to contribute. Come back if you do.
textByHashes.b73b25cdabff8f28b18d9d5b97eedd4f1041c3fa: The museum is finished! Feel free to enter if you have the time.
textByHashes.fe5d248a3c1644678bf672dedff39f15927a2898: Feel free to explore this floor at your leisure while the floor below is under construction.
textByHashes.55ca81ef5482b0274a1cde975cdc83d769279e83: This floor was built some time ago and is not as accurate as it once was.
textByHashes.6d07764ea3873af3816e4a3acae568cefeade5af: Now, due to popular demand, the knights of Falador have decided to expand upon the displays to ensure that it includes all discoveries which have been made in recent years.
textByHashes.666a2a9d1b4905a0c083171a6046a08cd67763f8: Unfortunately we lack the man power to acquire all of the resources required to build the displays.
textByHashes.a881b1499632c4d85a2ca14ad15a1a21893b3163: We'd appreciate it if you could donate any materials you find on your adventures.
textByHashes.6ae699b57252448535a477b72e75ecfbe68c12d8: The knights of Falador appreciate your support.
textByHashes.7d9c9ebf6896f39f279f68be5817fafdedc16e91: I understand, you adventurers are busy folk. If you change your mind make sure to let me know.
textByHashes.6a4b3e053dfc66a1324ef0e0bf2ab4940005ab83: Marvelous! What would you like to contribute?
textByHashes.f58c7a8078ae4315645cf29af18fedca8d33e4c4: We appreciate your contribution. Do make sure to come back once the museum has been expanded and check out the exhibits!
textByHashes.57bf2d9d92be3a30829b8e50619084fced119c01: Of course. Here's the progress made so far.
